summary.news_summary: 【テストモード】APIキーが設定されていないため、実際の要約は生成されていません。GEMINI_API_KEY環境変数を設定してください。収集された記事のタイトルのみ表示しています。
summary.opinion_summary: 【テストモード】メディアの意見分析はAPIキーが必要です。実際の運用時はGemini APIキーを設定することで、ポジティブ・ネガティブ・中立の意見分析が自動生成されます。

sentiment.positive: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます

raw_articles.title: Why worms (and microbes) are catching on as a manure pollution solution
raw_articles.summary: Anthony Agueda, a third-generation California dairy farmer, pulls a rake through a bed of dark, wet wood chips on his family’s land in Hickman, a tiny town in the state’s agricultural heartland. He reaches down with both hands and pulls up a clump of muck, turning it over to reveal a half-dozen squirming red earthworms.…

Presentation: Designing AI Platforms for Reliability: Tools for Certainty, Agents for Discovery
raw_articles.summary: Aaron Erickson explains how NVIDIA designs and tests purpose-built AI agent hierarchies. For senior developers and architects, he outlines why balancing deterministic tools with agentic discovery is crucial. Discover how to leverage rare context, implement LLM-as-a-judge test pyramids, and avoid the paradox of choice to build highly reliable, production-grade AI systems at scale. By Aaron Erickson

raw_articles.title: The ‘first’ AI-run ransomware attack still needed a human
raw_articles.summary: An AI agent carried out the technical execution of a real-world ransomware attack for the first known time, but new details show a human still chose the victim, set up the infrastructure, and supplied stolen credentials — meaning it wasn't quite the fully autonomous cybercrime debut that last week's headlines suggested.
